expectations.text: Follows the complete pipeline (browse → evaluate → cross-ref scan → vendor → sidecar → preset → install → verify)
expectations.evidence: Response explicitly walks through Steps 1–7 plus 'Step 2.5 — Cross-Reference & Dependency Scan' as a named section. All major pipeline phases are present.

expectations.text: Runs Step 2.5 cross-reference scan on code-reviewer
expectations.evidence: Step 2.5 section shows: `grep -ni "skill|agent|use_skill|invoke|require|depends" "$COMP" | grep -v "LICENSE"` and reports scan results (self-invocation strings only, no dep references). Also runs Step 2.5d to verify the existing coding-standards dependency alignment.

expectations.text: Creates correct sidecar file type (file component → .source.yaml sibling, not SOURCE.yaml inside folder)
expectations.evidence: Step 4 references 'existing code-reviewer.source.yaml' by that exact filename. Step 2 notes 'code-reviewer.source.yaml ✅ sidecar present'. Correct .source.yaml sibling pattern confirmed.

expectations.text: Uses correct install command (pnpm install:project not pnpm install)
